title: psychotria urbaniana
intro: Psychotria urbaniana, also known as Urban's Wild Coffee or Wild Coffee Tree, is a shrub or small tree species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies that have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
